scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly identifies CertificateAvailableEvent but misses CertificateDeniedEvent from the gold standard. It also focuses on v3/v4 of the old charmhub tls-certificates-interface library rather than v1 of the current charmlibs.interfaces.tls_certificates library. The 'when to request' guidance partially overlaps but misses the specific error codes (101-103, 201) and the interface contract details about requirer/provider roles.
scores.hallucination_notes: The detailed v3/v4 API descriptions (AllCertificatesInvalidatedEvent, CertificateInvalidatedEvent, CertificateCreationRequestEvent, renewal_relative_time, Mode enum, refresh_events constructor parameter) are plausible descriptions of the older tls-certificates-interface library but cannot be fully verified against the gold standard which describes a different library version. Minor inaccuracies in v4 detail claims are possible.
